-可靠性问题-可解释性限制-成本和资源需求-安全和隐私担忧**市场挑战**：

{"result": "{\"query\": \"2026 US AI agent market forecast trends companies growth projections\", \"follow_up_questions\": null, \"answer\": \"The U.S. AI‑agent market is poised for rapid expansion in 2026, with the broader global AI‑agent sector projected to grow at a 46% compound annual growth rate, swelling from roughly $7.8 billion in 2025 to more than $52 billion by 2030, and the agentic‑AI segment alone valued at about $2.33 billion in the United States, representing roughly a third of the worldwide $9.1 billion market that year; adoption is already deepening, as roughly 35 % of enterprises report broad use of AI agents, another 27 % are experimenting in limited contexts, and 17 % have deployed agents company‑wide, while Gartner expects 40 % of enterprise applications to embed task‑specific agents by the end of 2026 (up from under 5 % in 2025), and IDC forecasts a ten‑fold increase in agent usage and a thousand‑fold surge in inference demand by 2027, driving spending that Gartner estimates will reach $202 billion in 2026;
